claims.headline: Boosts exercise tolerance
claims.notesSentence: Cordyceps militaris supplementation improved tolerance to high-intensity exercise in healthy adults.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Cordyceps high-intensity exercise study on PubMed

claims.headline: Improves stamina
claims.notesSentence: A double-blind RCT in older adults reported improvements in metabolic exercise capacity and quality of life.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Cordyceps exercise capacity RCT on PubMed
